service.name: Twitch
service.description: Live streaming platform for gaming and entertainment

api_access.conditions: Twitch API available with client credentials or OAuth. Helix API for streams, channels, games, clips, users. Rate limits apply.

scrape_data.conditions: Scraping Twitch content is prohibited. Use the Twitch API for programmatic access.

allow_training.conditions: Twitch content may not be used to train AI/ML models without authorization.
